title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Scripbox - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Scripbox - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Scripbox are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Scripbox:
Scripbox is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scripbox!
